reviews.comment:
No me resulta el sistema de atención en el servicio de comida o bar, siempre elegimos  este lugar  de parada, tendré que buscar otro

(Translated by Google)
I don't like the service system at the food or bar; we always choose this place as a stop, I'll have to look for another one.

reviews.comment:
El cambio no les favoreció en lo qué al restaurante se refiere.
Café quemado, el desayuno en el ACA de Tala era de las cosas que más esperaba, las facturas eran únicas, y la atención de los mozos impecable.
Una pena ojalá vuelvan a ser cómo eran antes 😔

(Translated by Google)
The change didn't do them any favors when it came to the restaurant. The coffee was burnt, and breakfast at the ACA in Tala was one of the things I looked forward to most; the pastries were unique, and the service was impeccable. It's a shame; I hope they go back to how they were before. 😔
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJOW9fRkhnEAE
